title: realization_request.v1
description: Realization request accepted by the Keyhole Test Runtime. Supports both the simple SDK form (candidate_digest + payload) and the bridge envelope form (with promotion_uuid, authority, and artifact fields).

candidate_digest.description: A stable digest identifying the candidate being realized.

payload.description: Optional bounded input associated with the realization request.

promotion_uuid.description: Promotion UUID from the realization package (bridge envelope only).

artifact_refs.description: Artifact references from the approved change (bridge envelope only).

expected_capabilities.description: Expected capabilities from the approved change (bridge envelope only).

lane.description: Deployment lane from the authority block (bridge envelope only).

purpose.description: Purpose from the authority block (bridge envelope only).
